themeWords.meaning: God; mighty one; the true God of Israel

sentenceTheme: All peoples are called to rejoice as God ascends and reigns as King over the whole earth.

verses.text: O clap your hands, all ye people; shout unto God with the voice of triumph.

highlightedWords.meaning: to shout loudly; raise a cry
God; mighty one; the true God of Israel

verses.text: For the LORD most high is terrible; he is a great King over all the earth.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal, covenant name of God; the LORD

verses.text: He shall subdue the people under us, and the nations under our feet.
He shall choose our inheritance for us, the excellency of Jacob whom he loved. Selah.
God is gone up with a shout, the LORD with the sound of a trumpet.

highlightedWords.meaning: a loud shout; alarm; trumpet blast; joyful sound

verses.text: Sing praises to God, sing praises: sing praises unto our King, sing praises.

highlightedWords.meaning: God; mighty one; the true God of Israel

verses.text: For God is the King of all the earth: sing ye praises with understanding.

highlightedWords.meaning: God; mighty one; the true God of Israel

verses.text: God reigneth over the heathen: God sitteth upon the throne of his holiness.

highlightedWords.meaning: to reign; be king; exercise dominion
throne; seat of honor; royal seat

verses.text: The princes of the people are gathered together, even the people of the God of Abraham: for the shields of the earth belong unto God: he is greatly exalted.

highlightedWords.meaning: noble; prince; one willing and generous
